{{Quote|Listen, bud. I'm not the idiot who crowded formation. If you had followed my orders, we wouldn't be down here. And if we're going to get out of the Wilds without some corvaj ripping our livers out, you're going to follow my orders, got it?|Ranna Gorjaye to Calson after their training patrol crash|<ref name="sc" />}}
The '''corvaj''' was a predator that inhabited the [[Wilds]], an area of overgrown jungle and swampy lowlands that was known as the location of [[Insect/Legends|insect]] swarms and vicious beasts. The corvaj was known to be deadly; they ambushed their prey, and were noted for ripping out a victim's [[Liver/Legends|liver]]. Corvajs had a distinctive snarl, and were capable of [[Death/Legends|killing]] a grown [[Human/Legends|Human]].<ref name="sc" />

Some [[Time/Legends|time]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Cadet/Legends|cadet]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] [[Ranna Gorjaye]] and [[Calson]] were flying a training patrol over a [[Unidentified planet (Wilds)|planet]]. While above the Wilds, Calson overcrowded the formation, causing both [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] to crash into the wilderness. Aware that corvajs inhabited the Wilds, Gorjaye sought to lead the pair of them to the safety of a [[Unidentified settlement (Ranna Gorjaye)|settlement]] seventeen [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] from their position. Calson, however, refused to follow the orders of a [[Gender/Legends|woman]]. Setting off on his own, Calson was ambushed and killed by a corvaj.<ref name="sc" /> Gorjaye managed to escape the Wilds.<ref name="tdc">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The corvaj was first mentioned in the short text story ''[[Survival Class]]'', which appeared in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].<ref name="sc" />

The planet on which the incident occurs is never identified in the text, but Gorjaye's biography states that she received flight training on both the planets [[Salliche/Legends|Salliche]] and [[Raithal/Legends|Raithal]],<ref name="tdc" /> indicating that the corvaj could be native to either planet—although there is no direct evidence in the story to suggest that this is the case. The only part of the planet mentioned by name is the area known as the Wilds; while the planet [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] is known to have an area called "[[The Wilds (Kiffex)|The Wilds]],"<ref name="legacy 34">[[Legacy (2006) 34|''Legacy'' (2006) 34]]</ref> no source to date has established a definite link between the two locations.
